bounded_scope: Partially consume repo-recorded Figma node 151:2 without direct Figma work by uploading the redacted archive manifest JSON into Drive before completing an export and exposing only package-ready markers.
changes: Added uploadStudentArchiveDrivePackage to upload the redacted archive manifest JSON to the configured Drive evidence root through the existing service-account helper.
Updated /api/admin/exports/student-archive so complete exports require Drive package upload success; upload failures create failed exports and student_archive_export_drive_upload_failed audit events.
Stored successful Drive package file IDs only server-side in exports.drive_file_id while keeping export_artifacts as the app-scoped manifest body/hash/expiry record.
Updated /api/student/archive/readiness and /api/exports/:id/download to expose drivePackageReady booleans/headers without raw Drive storage identifiers.
Updated the canonical workspace Archive tab with a data-archive-drive-package row that distinguishes stored package files from pending package generation.
Expanded archive integration, workspace source/VM, and production source tests for Drive package upload success/failure and redaction.

validation.result: pass; 144 passing tests and 3 expected opt-in local-server skips
pass; static Cloudflare verification passed and live verification blocked only by missing CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
pass; HTTP 200 contained data-archive-drive-package on poll 3 after push

blockers.next_safe_action: Provide a scoped Cloudflare API token or run remote migration/deployment verification manually.

blockers.cause: The repo-side Drive package upload path is implemented and mocked in tests, but hosted proof requires Cloudflare Pages Google Drive credential secrets.
blockers.next_safe_action: Configure GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY, then verify archive package generation/download with fake .test accounts only.

blockers.cause: The repo exposes configurable archive retention defaults, but school retention policy has not been confirmed.
blockers.next_safe_action: Confirm whether the default 14-day archive download window is acceptable before real student archives.
